event: Allegory of Philosophy and Grammar as liberal arts
symbols: open book held by seated figure — knowledge and the pursuit of wisdom
architectural setting with Gothic arches — the ordered structure of medieval learning
seated posture on throne — the authority and dignity of the liberal arts
gesturing figures — the act of teaching and disputation
description: A fresco depicting four female figures in a Gothic architectural setting. On the left, a woman in a red dress and blue mantle sits enthroned holding an open book. Before her stands a woman in a green and white gown. On the right side, another woman in a pink robe sits on an elevated seat beneath a gilded Gothic canopy, gesturing toward a smaller figure in brown. The background features deep blue walls with ornate architectural details including pointed arches and decorative columns.
